title: The ULTIMATE PVP Modpack
description: This Modpack will make you very good at PvP! Including all the BEST PvP mods necessary for the best Minecraft PvP experience!
body:
**This is a modpack which has a lot of PVP oriented and optimized mods that will improve the PvP experience!**

Unfortunately, the video can't be accessed right now. It will be fixed as soon as I can get it working.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/htvhKw9tvVc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Mod information below the picture

![very cool looking thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1db79b431eb6903dfdb666dc06b81d20f8e4d834_0.webp)

This Modpack includes...

- Full Hitreg configuration

- Little no lag with Elytra, Anchoring, Crystaling, and Hitting

- Full Modpack Configuration

- Customizable Motion Blur

- Fully Customizable PvP Bots

- FPS Boosts due to mods like Sodium, Entity Culling, Sodium Extra, and Lithium being installed in the Modpack

This Modpack is only in Early-Alpha and will have some issues, and bugs.
